zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset於大約1527年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓時，他的父親Sir John Fitz Rogers22歲，母親Katherine Weston28歲。他於大約1542年與Cecilia Luttrel在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在英國多瑟特被列為sheriff。他去世於1605年5月11日之前在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特布藍德福德 福盧姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset于大约1527年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓时，他的父亲Sir John Fitz Rogers22岁，母亲Katherine Weston28岁。他于大约1542年与Cecilia Luttrel在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在英国多瑟特被列为sheriff。他去世于1605年5月11日之前在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特布藍德福德 福盧姆。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset was born about 1527, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Fitz Rogers, was 22 and his mother, Katherine Weston, was 28. He married Cecilia Luttrel about 1542, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff in Dorset, England. He died before 11 May 1605, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Blandford Forum, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset est né environ 1527, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Fitz Rogers, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katherine Weston, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Luttrel environ 1542, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Dorset, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 11 mai 1605, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Blandford Forum, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset um 1527 in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Fitz Rogers 22 und seine Mutter Katherine Weston 28. Er hat um 1542 in England Cecilia Luttrel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff in Dorset, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 11. Mai 1605 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Blandford Forum, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset è nato il circa 1527 nel Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Fitz Rogers, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Weston, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia Luttrel circa 1542, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Dorset, England. Morì prima del 11 maggio 1605, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Blandford Forum, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorsetが約1527年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリアンストンで生まれた時，父Sir John Fitz Rogersは22歳，母Katherine Westonは28歳であった。約1542年にイギリスでCecilia Luttrelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。イギリスドールセトでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1605年5月11日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトブランドフォード フォーウムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset(이)가 대략 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Fitz Rogers(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Weston(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1542년 영국에서 Cecilia Luttrel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 도르세트에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1605년 5월 11일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 블랜드퍼드 포럼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset nasceu aproximadamente 1527, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Fitz Rogers, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Weston, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Luttrel aproximadamente 1542, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Dorset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 11 de maio de 1605, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Blandford Forum, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset родился около 1527 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Fitz Rogers было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Weston, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Luttrel около 1542 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии sheriff в местности дорсет, Англия. Он умер перед 11 май 1605 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности бландфорд форум, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Cecilia Luttrel aproximadamente 1542, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Dorset, Inglaterra.
